name: Chicken Ala Can-Can
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except the French onion rings.
2. Pour the mixture into a casserole dish.
3. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Bake for 7 minutes.
5. Sprinkle the French onion rings evenly over the top of the dish.
6. Return the casserole to the oven and bake for an additional 7 minutes, or until heated through and lightly golden on top.
